ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the conference (e.g., open, closed, upcoming) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the conference */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for the conference */,
  "submission_deadline" TEXT /* Submission deadline for the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_conference_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference */,
  "author_role" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is an author */,
  "reviewer_role" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a reviewer */,
  "spc_role" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a senior program committee member */,
  "pc_role" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a program committee member */,
  "organizer_role" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is an organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_conference_roles_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_conference_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the paper was submitted to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the paper (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the paper */,
  "num_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the paper */,
  "num_authors" INTEGER /* Number of authors of the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authorship */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the paper */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_authors_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_authors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_reviews_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the meeting is for */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the meeting */,
  "minutes_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the minutes of the meeting */,
  "num_attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the meeting */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the meeting (e.g., 1 hour, 2 hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_meetings_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who participated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the meeting (e.g., chair, member) */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the participant (e.g., attended, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_participants_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES committee_meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of preferences */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user wants email notifications */,
  "sms_notifications" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user wants SMS notifications */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "num_emails_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of emails the user wants to receive per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the track belongs to */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the track */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track chair */,
  "num_papers" INTEGER /* Number of papers assigned to the track */,
  "num_reviewers" INTEGER /* Number of reviewers assigned to the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_tracks_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_tracks_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_papers" (
  "track_paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track-paper assignment */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was assigned to the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_papers_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_papers_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES conference_tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled event */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., keynote, session, workshop) */,
  "event_title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "speaker_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of speaker IDs */,
  "num_attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the event */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event (e.g., 1 hour, 2 hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_schedules_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the payment was for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the award was given at */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_awards_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_awards_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
